summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Web3 Scam Detector new features (iteration 2). All 32 backend tests passed (13 original + 19 new). All frontend UI tests passed for new components: Extension section, LiquidityPanel, TransactionVolumeChart.
critical_code_review_comments: DEX liquidity integration via DexScreener API working correctly with 6s timeout and graceful degradation
Token scoring now includes liquidity-based reasons (Healthy liquidity, Low liquidity, No DEX pair found, Dead volume)
Wallet txTimeline returns exactly 30 daily buckets with date/count/failed fields
Extension zip download working (9255 bytes, contains manifest.json and all required files)
All data-testid attributes properly added for new components
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test scans created during testing stored in MongoDB analyses collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: (1) POST /api/analyze-token for USDC returns insights.liquidity with totalLiquidityUsd=$7.44M, priceUsd=$0.9995, 30 pairs, pairCount=30. (2) Token scoring includes 'Healthy liquidity' reason for USDC. USDC score=55 (Suspicious) due to mint/freeze authority. (3) POST /api/analyze-wallet returns insights.txTimeline with 30 daily buckets. (4) GET /extension/scamcheck-extension.zip returns 200 with valid 9255-byte zip containing manifest.json, content.js, background.js, popup.html. (5) Frontend Extension section with download button and 'Chrome Extension · v1.0' badge working. (6) Frontend Navbar has Extension link. (7) LiquidityPanel renders on token results with liquidity stats and pairs list. (8) TransactionVolumeChart renders on wallet results below TransactionInsights. All previously-working features still work.

backend_new: POST /api/analyze-token returns insights.liquidity object with totalLiquidityUsd, priceUsd, pairs, pairCount
Token scoring includes 'Healthy liquidity' reason for high-liquidity tokens
Token scoring includes 'Mint authority active' and 'Freeze authority active' reasons
POST /api/analyze-wallet returns insights.txTimeline with 30 daily buckets
txTimeline buckets have date (YYYY-MM-DD), count, failed fields
Extension zip is valid (9255 bytes, contains manifest.json + required files)
frontend_new: Landing page #extension section with 'Chrome Extension · v1.0' badge
Extension download button (data-testid=extension-download-button) with correct href
LiquidityPanel (data-testid=liquidity-panel) on token results with stats and pairs
